# Codantrix Labs

> Pragmatic AI/ML partner for enterprises. Real solutions for real problems — built with accountable engineering and measurable ROI.

Codantrix Labs is a B2B AI/ML consultancy founded by Hassan Ali Mehdi in Lahore, Pakistan. We build production-grade machine learning, computer vision, industrial automation, and full-stack software for companies that need systems to work in the real world — not just in a demo.

## What we do

- **AI/ML Solutions** — Custom machine learning models with ground-truth validation for enterprise problems
- **Computer Vision Models** — Real-time CV systems for industrial applications and precision manufacturing
- **Industrial Automation** — End-to-end automation designed for reliability and ROI
- **Web Development** — Full-stack web solutions supporting complex AI backends and data flows

## How we work

Senior-IC pods. Production rigor from day one: hardened MLOps, observability, and ROI-first delivery. Cloud, edge, and on-prem deployment. Direct access to the founders — no layers between you and the people building your system.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://labs.codantrix.com/) — What we solve and how
- [Services](https://labs.codantrix.com/services) — AI/ML, computer vision, automation, web
- [Case Studies](https://labs.codantrix.com/case-studies) — Production deployments
- [Blog](https://labs.codantrix.com/blog) — Notes from the lab
- [Contact](https://labs.codantrix.com/contact) — Engage the founders

## Contact
